CreateEni.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
CreateEni.name: Name of the elastic network interface
CreateEni.subnetId: ID of the subnet to which the elastic network interface belongs
CreateEni.securityGroupIds: Collection of standard security groups to bind
CreateEni.enterpriseSecurityGroupIds: Collection of enterprise security groups to bind
CreateEni.privateIpSet.publicIpAddress: Public IP address (EIP) associated with the elastic network interface
CreateEni.privateIpSet.primary: Whether this is the primary IP address
CreateEni.privateIpSet.privateIpAddress: Private IPv4 address of the elastic network interface
CreateEni.ipv6PrivateIpSet.publicIpAddress: Public IP address (EIP) associated with the elastic network interface
CreateEni.ipv6PrivateIpSet.primary: Whether this is the primary IP address
CreateEni.ipv6PrivateIpSet.privateIpAddress: Private IPv6 address of the elastic network interface
CreateEni.description: Description of the elastic network interface
CreateEni.networkInterfaceTrafficMode: Specifies whether to create an elastic RDMA interface (ERI) or a standard elastic network interface (ENI)
